meta.name: Lucas Silva Mendes
meta.homeTitle: Lucas Silva Mendes — Full-stack Developer in São Carlos & Cataguases, Brazil
meta.siteDescription: Lucas Silva Mendes — full-stack developer (React, Next.js, Node.js) and data engineer based in São Carlos (SP) and Cataguases (MG), Brazil. Building from the interface to the data: front-end, cloud, pipelines and back-end.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The person behind the code
about.welcomeText: I'm Lucas Silva Mendes — a full-stack developer building from interface to data. Feel free to look around.

bio.title: Front-end
bio.desc: React, Next.js and TypeScript for complex, responsive interfaces.

bio.title: Cloud & Data
bio.desc: Production ETL pipelines on GCP, BigQuery and integration automation.

bio.title: Back-end & Security
bio.desc: Microservices, authentication and access control with Keycloak and RBAC.

bio.title: Product mindset
bio.desc: From data modeling to the user's screen, end to end.

bio.title: Real experience
bio.desc: BIP-Brain (healthcare) and data platforms at Deep Metrics.

bio.title: Education
bio.desc: Computer Engineering at UFSCar and a military-school background (EPCAR).

journey.title: Journey
journey.subtitle: Where I've been & what I shipped
journey.metaDescription: Lucas Silva Mendes' journey: data engineering and full-stack development at Deep Metrics, front-end at BIP Group (UFSCar), and a Computer Engineering degree.

items.title: Data Engineer & Full-stack Developer (Internship)
lines: 10 production ETL pipelines (n8n + Cloud Run) connecting 8+ ad & CRM platforms — Meta, Google and Microsoft Ads, GA4, Bitrix24, HubSpot, Pipedrive and RD Station — into BigQuery.
Server-side GTM tracking sending conversions in parallel to GA4, Meta, Google and Microsoft Ads — cross-channel attribution and stronger signals for the campaign algorithms.
BigQuery modeling that maps the full customer journey, from first lead to conversion in the CRM.
Marketing dashboards in JavaScript, HTML and CSS with Vite and Chart.js, replacing the static dashboards with a dynamic interface.
Node/Express backend serving the data from BigQuery and Supabase, with caching for performance.
Python scripts and advanced SQL for cleaning, enriching and integrating data across systems.

items.title: Front-end Developer
lines: 30+ screens in Figma and React + TypeScript for a medical-imaging diagnosis platform.
Two access profiles (user and administrator), plus the landing page and the auth/sign-up flows.
Full backend API integration for sending and receiving platform data.
Design iterated V1 → V2 before coding — UX validated in prototyping, less rework.
FAPESP scholarship in Technical Training for Web Development (scientific research at UFSCar).

items.title: Teaching Assistant — Intro to Algorithmic Thinking
lines: Helped first-year students with the fundamentals of logic and programming.

items.title: Computer Engineering
lines: A degree bridging software and hardware: algorithms, networks and distributed systems.
Thesis on automatic generation of authentication and authorization for microservices.

items.title: EPCAR — Air Cadets Preparatory School
lines: Elite Air Force high school training future officer aviators — exact sciences and discipline cranked to the max.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: What I've built
projects.metaDescription: Projects by Lucas Silva Mendes: the BIP-Brain medical imaging platform (React/TypeScript) and a thesis on auto-generating authentication and authorization for microservices.

items.name: BIP-Brain
items.description: A platform that helps radiologists and neurologists diagnose Alzheimer's and Multiple Sclerosis from medical imaging. I worked on the front-end: 30+ screens, authentication and sign-up flows, and the full API integration.

items.name: Automatic security for microservices
items.description: How do you secure microservices without wiring up auth by hand? My thesis extends the js-distributor tool to generate access control (RBAC) with Keycloak automatically, from an initial config — validated on example systems.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Stack & Competencies
skills.metaDescription: Lucas Silva Mendes' stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, GCP/BigQuery, Docker, AI agents and more — front-end, cloud, data and back-end.
